question: What hidden wrapper, DMA coherency, MBUS/storage-fabric, or DMA translation difference remains after descriptor geometry, visible DMAC, and visible GCTRL bits are closed?
kernel_subject: mmc: test A733 clean DMA access mode

comparison.vendor_value: v5p3x uses idma_des_size_bits=12, des_addr_shift=2, shifted DLBA/data/next descriptor addresses, FD/LD/OWN/CH descriptor flags, and 4 KiB descriptor sizing for the observed 4 KiB read
comparison.mainline_value: current diagnostic branch uses idma_des_size_bits=12, idma_des_shift=2, shifted DLBA/data/next addresses, FD/LD/OWN/CH, and one 4 KiB descriptor for H013
comparison.interpretation: H010 and H013 close descriptor geometry for the current one-descriptor failure

comparison.vendor_value: probe sets dma_mask and coherent_dma_mask to DMA_BIT_MASK(64) before dma_alloc_coherent
comparison.mainline_value: current diagnostic branch calls dma_set_mask_and_coherent(..., DMA_BIT_MASK(64)) before descriptor allocation
comparison.interpretation: 64-bit DMA mask was already runtime-falsified as a complete fix

comparison.vendor_value: dma_alloc_coherent descriptor ring, descriptor writes, then wmb(); no explicit dma_sync_single_for_device for the coherent ring
comparison.mainline_value: current diagnostic branch uses dma_alloc_coherent and adds an explicit dma_sync_single_for_device diagnostic after descriptor writes
comparison.delta: mainline diagnostic is stricter than vendor
comparison.interpretation: descriptor sync was already runtime-falsified; removing it is not a source-backed fix

comparison.vendor_value: dma_map_sg is required to return the same count as data->sg_len or the BSP errors out
comparison.mainline_value: H013 one-descriptor CMD18 logs sg_len=1 and dma_len=1
comparison.interpretation: scatterlist coalescing is not the current one-descriptor failure

comparison.vendor_value: SDMMC0 DTS and probe use ahb, mmc_store, mmc_mbus, and mmc_msi_lite clocks, enabled before clk_mmc
comparison.mainline_value: current diagnostic branch gets and enables mmc_store, mmc_mbus, and mmc_msi_lite, and logs storage fabric clocks on
comparison.interpretation: explicit fabric clocks, enable order, MSI Lite1 mapping, and descriptor page count were already runtime-falsified as complete fixes

comparison.vendor_value: working vendor reads advance CHDA/CBDA through descriptor and buffer addresses
comparison.mainline_value: H013 stalls with post-stall descriptor unchanged: des0=0x8000001c, size=0x00001000, buf=0x40574400, next=0x3f840004; CHDA=DLBA and CBDA=0
comparison.delta: IDMAC does not advance from descriptor base on mainline
comparison.interpretation: the best current evidence favors IDMAC not consuming/fetching the descriptor over stale CPU-visible descriptor contents

key_lines.storage_fabric: diag enable storage fabric clocks on
key_lines.dma_mask: diag A733 DMA mask set to 64 bits
key_lines.descriptor_alloc: diag descriptor coherent allocation sg_dma=0x0x00000000fe100000 pages=2 size=8192 low_mask=0
key_lines.dma_map: diag map_dma flags=0x200 blksz=512 blocks=8 sg_len=1 dma_len=1 dir=2
key_lines.descriptor_before: diag idma_des[0] sg_len=4096 des0=0x8000001c size=0x00001000 buf=0x40574400 next=0x3f840004
key_lines.stall: diag post-data poll11 rint=0x00000024 mista=0x00000000 idst=0x00004000 idie=0x00000002 dmac=0x00000282 dlba=0x3f840000 chda=0x3f840000 cbda=0x00000000 stas=0x02009509 cmdr=0x00003352 imask=0x0000fbc2 cbcr=0x00000400 bbcr=0x00000000 thld=0x02000001
key_lines.descriptor_after: diag idma_des_after des0=0x8000001c size=0x00001000 buf=0x40574400 next=0x3f840004

conclusion: No concrete source-backed hidden coherency or storage-fabric delta remains cheap enough to justify a behavior patch. Close H015 without build. The next responsible runtime proof should gather one new hardware evidence sample about the IDMAC descriptor-fetch path rather than cycling visible register guesses.
